subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of Truth, remembrance of the Most Great Victory and remnant of that glorious spirit, be thou associated with his character and attributes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الحق یادگار فتح اعظمی و بازمانده آن روح معظم پس بخلق و خوی او محشور شو
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @eulogies; reminiscences
